description: Expose ExecutionRuntimeData and ExecutionRuntimeDataInfos accessors on FStateTreeInstanceStorage for snapshot/restore (rollback support).

add: /** @return the execution runtime data container (for snapshot/restore). */
/** Registers an execution runtime data entry without appending data (for snapshot/restore). */
void AddExecutionRuntimeDataInfo(const FObjectKey InStateTree, const int32 InStartIndex)
/** Clears all execution runtime data info entries (for snapshot/restore). */
